hero.body: Real cases of Canary Islands businesses. Each project shows a service in action — with figures, not promises.

projects.title: A hotel that stays off-grid in peak season
projects.challenge: A four-star hotel with summer consumption peaks and an energy bill rising every year.
projects.solution: We designed a 200 kWp photovoltaic installation with batteries that covers daytime demand and backs up the busiest nights.
projects.result: 45% lower energy bill and autonomy during grid outages.

projects.title: An industrial plant that locks in its cost per kWh
projects.challenge: An industrial plant exposed to volatile electricity prices, with processes that cannot stop.
projects.solution: A 120 kWp rooftop installation with real-time monitoring and a preventive maintenance contract.
projects.result: Stable, predictable energy cost with no process downtime.

projects.title: A volcanic winery that cuts its wine-making cost
projects.challenge: A winery with an intensive cooling process and limited access to grants for lack of technical support.
projects.solution: We integrated 90 kWp into the winery and handled the NextGen subsidies end to end.
projects.result: Lower wine-making cost and part of the investment covered by grants.

projects.title: A shopping centre that turns its car park into energy
projects.challenge: A shopping centre with an underused car park and growing demand for charging points.
projects.solution: We covered the car park with a 350 kWp solar canopy and integrated EV charging points.
projects.result: On-site generation, shade for customers and a new charging service.

testimonial.quote: The team did not just install our renewable energy system from day one. They solved a real problem for us.
testimonial.name: Roberto Martinez

stats.title: Results that speak for themselves
stats.body: Every installation we complete demonstrates the real impact renewable energy can have on the finances of a Canarian company or home.

cta.body: We start with a free energy audit: we analyse your consumption, the solar potential of your site and the estimated return. No commitment.
cta.trust: No cost · No commitment · Reply within 24h
